objective: Define M365 as a TAI-loadable connector module with preserved auth, mutation gates, idempotency, and auditability.

in_scope: connector module capability contract for m365 instruction execution
module-facing execution entrypoint mapped to provisioning/orchestration
auth + mutation gate + idempotency + audit preservation

functional: keep action/params to ok/result/error/trace_id response compatibility
preserve ALLOW_M365_MUTATIONS and caller auth checks
non_functional: no secrets in module metadata or logs
backward compatibility with existing voice->M365 path

tasks.name: Define connector module capability and manifest requirements
Expose/confirm module entrypoint mapped to existing instruction execution
Enforce auth, mutation gate, idempotency at module boundary
Update docs for integration and entitlements

validation: contract tests pass for module invocation shape
audit and trace records remain complete
success_criteria: M365 capability documented as loadable connector module
dependencies: TAI core module host and entitlement model
